scripts.ddd-spec:validate: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- validate --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml
scripts.ddd-spec:build: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- build --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml
scripts.ddd-spec:viewer: npm run build --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli && npm run repo:cli --workspace=packages/ddd-spec-cli -- viewer --config apps/ddd-spec-viewer/ddd-spec.config.yaml --
scripts.ddd-spec:verify: npm run ddd-spec:build && npm run ddd-spec:test && npm run build --workspace=apps/ddd-spec-viewer
